ahmedabad_notes: Ahmedabad uses 83 geocoded public-library locations from the local APL/M.J. Network source.
toronto_notes: Toronto uses 100 branches plus two bookmobiles from TPL key facts; the open-data feed has 112 service records.

ahmedabad_notes: Ahmedabad value is the disclosed M.J. Library Network collection total for 2025-26.
toronto_notes: Toronto value is a lower-bound 2024 TPL key fact because the source states 'more than 10.5 million items'.

ahmedabad_notes: Ahmedabad reports 26,834 network members in 2025-26, or about one member per 264 residents.
toronto_notes: A directly comparable current registered-user stock was not found in the normalized TPL sources.

metric_label: Annual member/card registration flow per 100,000 residents
ahmedabad_notes: Ahmedabad reports 505 annual members in 2025-26; this is a membership tier, not a count of new users, so no ratio is computed.
toronto_notes: Toronto reports 235,270 people registered for a library card in 2024; a genuine new-user inflow.
Toronto reports 28 million material borrowings in 2024; format split is not normalized here.

ahmedabad_notes: Ahmedabad Public Library/M.J. Network disclosures do not expose a current physical-visit count.
toronto_notes: Toronto reports 13.4 million branch visits and nearly 45 million total branch plus online visits in 2024.

metric_label: Population-weighted median walk time to nearest library
ahmedabad_notes: Ahmedabad value is a ward-centroid, population-weighted walking proxy; full scheduled routing is not computed.
toronto_notes: Toronto population-origin and TTC routing joins are pending on this branch.

metric_label: Reading/library materials share of operating budget
ahmedabad_notes: Ahmedabad uses the 2025-26 reading-material line over total budget.
toronto_notes: Toronto uses the 2026 Library Materials line over gross expenditure.

ahmedabad_notes: Ahmedabad's library-income line is an upper bound for user fees/self-income, not pure fees.
toronto_notes: Toronto labels this line 'Revenues (fines, fees)' on the 2026 finance page.
